[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up selfie shows a person with a light blue head covering and eyes closed, covering their mouth with their hands.

The main subject is a person shown from the top of the head down to the nose area, filling most of the frame. Their head is covered with a light blue fabric, and their eyes are closed. Both hands are raised in front of the face, with the palms and fingers covering the mouth area, and the hands are held close together, partially obscuring the lower half of the face.

The setting appears to be indoors with a soft, out-of-focus background. Behind the person, there are light-colored walls and a partially visible framed or poster-like object with a teal and orange element near the right side of the image.

Lighting is soft and even, with no harsh shadows. The camera angle is very close and centered on the face, creating a tight crop. The skin is light-toned, the head covering is light blue, and the hands have a similar light skin tone. The overall composition is dominated by the face and head covering.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a tight close-up of a person wearing a light blue head covering and closing their eyes. Their hands cover their mouth area while the background remains softly blurred indoors.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No text visible]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to show a person covering their face with a cloth; there are no visible words, labels, or UI elements to extract.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
